test.name: Generate Token

kw.name: Create Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://demoqa.com/Account/v1/GenerateToken path_url=/Account/v1/GenerateToken headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '52', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"userName": "pauloqa2337", "password": "Test@1234"}'

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Item
kw.msg: Value of dictionary key 'status' does not match: Failed != Success
kw.doc: An item of ``key`` / ``value`` must be found in a ``dictionary``.
kw.status: Value of dictionary key 'status' does not match: Failed != Success

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.status: Value of dictionary key 'status' does not match: Failed != Success

test.status: Value of dictionary key 'status' does not match: Failed != Success
